title: Sith Sentry
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Sith Sentries''' were a type of [[Security droid/Legends|security droid]] that was developed by the ancient [[Sith (species)/Legends|Sith]].

During the early period of the [[Sith Empire/Legends|Sith Empire]], the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] came to realize the advantages of automated soldiers. Thus, they manufactured several different types of [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] which included sentries that were the smallest and most commonly produced that acted as a form of low-security guard. Their mechanical nature that they were often placed on guard duty where organic troopers would quickly tire and grow bored of as [[Time/Legends|time]] passed on. Sith factories, palaces, [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyards]] and warehouses had handfuls of these sentry [[Droid/Legends|droids]] guarding them. For their operations, they were equipped with an arm mounted [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]].

In addition, these sentry droids were also placed on [[Derriphan-class battleship|battleships]], [[Sith escort gunship|escort gunships]] and [[Sith dreadnaught|personnel carriers]]. During emergency situations, sentries were deployed in groups of six though otherwise were stationed at pre-determined sites or engaged in a pre-programmed patrol pattern.
